channel.title: alixandstephen TikTok
channel.description: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from alixandstephen

item.title: We always wanted a zoo, and I think we’re slowly working our way there lol. We are actually working on making a reptile room/office. So 10 points if you can guess what we’re putting in the new statement piece and also let us know what lizards and amphibia
item.description: We always wanted a zoo, and I think we’re slowly working our way there lol. We are actually working on making a reptile room/office. So 10 points if you can guess what we’re putting in the new statement piece and also let us know what lizards and amphibia
item.author: alixandstephen

item.title: Thank goodness for home gyms 😉 #alixandstephen #valentines #gmwd
item.description: Thank goodness for home gyms 😉 #alixandstephen #valentines #gmwd
item.author: alixandstephen

item.title: This Valentine’s Day is all about prioritizing us 🤍 even in the middle of real life. #alixandstephen #hypicus
item.description: This Valentine’s Day is all about prioritizing us 🤍 even in the middle of real life. #alixandstephen #hypicus
item.author: alixandstephen

item.title: You don’t know this but we did this whole lizard thing before we had kids. Now that the kids are older, we’re getting back into our animal passion. #alixandstephen #beardeddragon
item.description: You don’t know this but we did this whole lizard thing before we had kids. Now that the kids are older, we’re getting back into our animal passion. #alixandstephen #beardeddragon
item.author: alixandstephen

item.title: We hope you guys like him more than @Stephen Lomas does ❤️ #alixandstephen #beardeddragon
item.description: We hope you guys like him more than @Stephen Lomas does ❤️ #alixandstephen #beardeddragon

item.title: This arcade date night had us reliving the 90’s! What’s the next date theme?? #alixandstephen #thebodyshop #90s #datenight

item.title: Can’t wait for you all to meet the new baby! #alixandstephen #enclosure

item.title: She is SOO cool! But way too fast lol thank you @Sapphire Dragons !! #alixandstephen #beardeddragon

item.title: Icarus still hasn’t laid her eggs since I put sand in her cage btw. But she’s been acting normal. Her belly isn’t crazy big either. #alixandstephen #chameleon
item.description: Icarus still hasn’t laid her eggs since I put sand in her cage btw. But she’s been acting normal. Her belly isn’t crazy big either. #alixandstephen #chameleon
item.author: alixandstephen

item.title: Spent a few hundred but it was worth it for his majesty 💚 #alixandstephen #chameleon

item.title: He is literally only a daddy’s boy for the camera, this is crazy 😂😂 #alixandstephen #dad

item.title: You gave us more than objects, more than things we’ll hold or see, you gave our family moments, and chances to simply be happy. ❤️ Thank you for being our friends @AT&T! #alixandstephen #happy
item.description: You gave us more than objects, more than things we’ll hold or see, you gave our family moments, and chances to simply be happy. ❤️ Thank you for being our friends @AT&T! #alixandstephen #happy

item.title: Seems like my mommy moments are getting more and more rare nowadays. So THANK YOU @Bella Mckay - “B&B Nails” for the fine job ❤️❤️❤️ #mom #alixandstephen
